title: Arrest tentacle
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Arrest tentacles''' were extruded from the nose of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] ships to capture and reel in enemy ships.

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
